data.title: BlueNord Announces Revised Timeline for Tyra II Production
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Norwegian Energy Company ASA ( (GB:0HTF) ) has issued an update.

BlueNord ASA has announced a revision in the timeline for reaching full production capacity at the Tyra II facility, operated by TotalEnergies, from the originally expected date of 21 January 2025 to 31 January 2025. This delay is due to ongoing work to replace a seal on a gas compressor, which temporarily affects the facility’s operational capacity. The update is consistent with BlueNord’s prior communications and reflects the company’s ongoing efforts to ensure the technical readiness of its operations.

More about Norwegian Energy Company ASA

BlueNord ASA is a significant European oil and gas company specializing in energy resource production and development, as well as supporting the energy transition. The company holds a 36.8 percent stake in the Danish Underground Consortium, which manages oil and gas production in the Danish North Sea. BlueNord is publicly traded on the Oslo Stock Exchange under the ticker ‘BNOR’.

Average Trading Volume: 704

data.title: Neogen Corporation Reports Q2 2025 Earnings Highlights
data.description:
Neogen ( (NEOG) ) has released its Q2 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Neogen presented to its investors.

Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Neogen Corporation specializes in developing comprehensive solutions for the Food Safety, Livestock, and Pet Health & Wellness markets, leveraging science and technology to enhance global food security and well-being. The company operates across more than 140 countries, offering a robust network of scientists and technical experts dedicated to optimizing product and technological solutions for its clients.

In its latest earnings report, Neogen disclosed a preliminary net loss of $456.3 million for the second quarter of 2025, primarily due to a non-cash goodwill impairment charge. Despite this, the company reported an adjusted net income of $24.4 million, maintaining a steady $0.11 per diluted share. The total revenue for the quarter was $231.3 million, which reflects a small increase compared to the previous year.

Key financial highlights from Neogen’s report include a core revenue growth of 3.5%, albeit affected negatively by foreign currency and product line impacts. The Food Safety segment experienced a marginal revenue decline, while the Animal Safety segment saw a 2.8% increase, driven largely by biosecurity and animal care products. The company also faced challenges in its Genomics business and recognized material weaknesses in internal controls over financial reporting.

Looking ahead, Neogen has updated its full-year guidance, adjusting expectations due to currency fluctuations and restructuring activities. The company anticipates revenues between $905 million and $925 million, with adjusted EBITDA projected to be between $205 million and $215 million.

Neogen’s management remains focused on strategic restructuring and operational improvements to enhance profitability and market position, despite the current financial setbacks. The company aims to leverage its ongoing integration of the 3M Food Safety business and capitalize on improving market conditions to secure future growth.

data.title: Torq Resources Secures Shareholder Approval for Strategic Santa Cecilia Joint Venture
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Torq Resources Inc ( (TSE:TORQ) ) has issued an update.

Torq Resources Inc. announced that its shareholders have overwhelmingly approved a joint venture transaction with Gold Fields Limited for the Santa Cecilia project in Chile during their Annual General and Special Meeting. This strategic partnership involves an earn-in option allowing Gold Fields’ affiliate to acquire up to a 75% interest in the project by investing up to USD$48 million over six years. The approval marks a significant step for Torq Resources, potentially enhancing its market positioning and growth prospects in the mining sector. The transaction remains subject to final approval by the TSX Venture Exchange and other closing conditions.

More about Torq Resources Inc

Torq Resources Inc. operates in the mining industry, focusing on exploration and development projects. The company is involved in the identification and acquisition of mineral properties, aiming to develop these assets for future production, with a particular focus on projects in Chile.

data.title: BioVaxys Completes Third Tranche of Private Placement and Settles Debt
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

BioVaxys Technology ( (TSE:BIOV) ) has shared an update.

BioVaxys Technology Corp. has completed the third tranche of its private placement, raising $537,500 through the issuance of 10,750,000 units at $0.05 per unit. Each unit includes a common share and a warrant convertible into an additional share at $0.15 until January 10, 2027. The proceeds will be used for working capital, and no finder’s fees were incurred. The company also issued 5,000,000 shares at $0.10 per share to settle $500,000 of debt with an external consultant. This financial maneuvering is expected to support BioVaxys’s ongoing operations and enhance its market positioning as it continues to develop its immunotherapy platforms.

More about BioVaxys Technology

BioVaxys Technology Corp., based in British Columbia, Canada, is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing innovative immunotherapies using its DPX™ technology platform and HapTenix© ‘neoantigen’ tumor cell construct platform. These platforms are designed to treat cancers, infectious diseases, and other immunological conditions by inducing targeted, long-lasting immune responses.

data.title: HYTN Innovations Secures Initial Order in Global Cannabis Expansion
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

The latest update is out from HYTN Innovations Inc ( (TSE:HYTN) ).

HYTN Innovations Inc. announced the receipt of an initial purchase order under its partnership with SNDL Inc., a major player in the cannabis industry. This collaboration, which involves using EU Good Manufacturing Practice standards, aims to enhance their presence in the international cannabis market. The partnership highlights HYTN’s ability to produce high-volume, EU GMP-certified cannabis and supports SNDL’s expansion into global markets. The agreement positions both companies to capitalize on the growing global cannabis industry, with significant opportunities in regions like Germany and Australia.

More about HYTN Innovations Inc

HYTN Innovations Inc. is a pharmaceutical company that specializes in the manufacturing of pharmaceutical-grade cannabis. The company is focused on expanding its presence in regulated international markets, including the UK, Germany, and Australia.
